message:
test(distributed): add 6 edge case tests for cluster, ring, snapshot, recovery

Expand distributed test coverage with:
- ring_single_node_covers_all_keys: verify single-node ring answers all lookups
- cluster_readd_after_remove: verify re-added node gets new ID
- cluster_exhaustion: verify ASX_DIST_MAX_NODES limit enforced
- assignment_multi_failure_rebalance: 2-of-4 node failure with rebalance
- snapshot_exhaustion: verify ASX_DIST_MAX_SNAPSHOTS limit enforced
- recovery_no_snapshots: full recovery cycle without any snapshots

21/21 distributed tests now pass (up from 15).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
